positive: Minimalist symmetrical pattern featuring a cluster of various celestial objects—stylized crescent moons, geometric stars, and orbiting Saturn rings—set against a deep indigo cosmic background. The objects should be rendered in a limited palette of glowing gold foil and matte cream. Composition must be centered and repeating for apparel print, using strong, clean silhouettes and crisp vector lines. Emphasize deep contrast and elegant, ethereal lighting that suggests distance and mystery. Aspect ratio must be suitable for seamless tiling and high-quality fabric printing.
negative: blur, jpeg artifacts, noise, smudges, text, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, low detail, dirty, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, busy clutter, excessive color gradient, cartoonish
